patch.value: pm-web-9y25
Spec new package pm-hooks for git workflow enforcement
Define pm-hooks package to provide pre-commit/pre-push/commit-msg integration that validates pm item hygiene (active claims, linked tests/files, close metadata) before code changes leave local repos.
Plan
open
codex-5-3
Spec covers install UX, hook lifecycle management, bypass/audit policy, command contracts, error messaging, portability, and CI compatibility test matrix.
Prevent governance drift by enforcing pm best practices at the source of developer workflow.
A practical hook package design that teams can adopt incrementally with low friction.

## Proposed command surface
- `pm hooks install [--profile strict|balanced]`
- `pm hooks validate [--staged-only]`
- `pm hooks doctor`

## Hook policy checks
- Require claim/status alignment for modified items.
- Ensure linked tests/files exist before close transitions.
- Validate closure metadata and missing blocker reasons.

## MVP milestones
1) install/uninstall lifecycle
2) pre-commit validation runner
3) policy profiles + bypass audit logs
closed
Documented command surface, data contracts, MVP milestones, and quality constraints for implementation handoff.
Each new package has an implementation-ready plan item with concrete acceptance criteria and design details.
Spec body and acceptance criteria completed with command proposals, data model expectations, and milestone breakdown.
Phase 6 package spec drafted and acceptance criteria defined.
